examples: Rubella is just another name for German measles.
The measles, mumps, and rubella vaccine is an established vaccine also quite expensive.
If you or your child catch measles, mumps, or rubella, there's no treatment that can get rid of the viruses.
By immunising all children against rubella, it provides protection to others, as yet unborn.
Dr Troup defended the policy of giving children a combined vaccine for measles, mumps and rubella.
